question: After reconnecting the Digilent HS3 cable, can the existing-routed v9984/tile64 bitstream be programmed and tested on the YPCB board?

readback.reason: The exact routed v9984 top has parameter ENABLE_JTAG_DEBUG=0, so the BSCANE2 debug payload block is not instantiated.

functional_status.expected_visibility: led_3bits_tri_o[1] is pass, led_3bits_tri_o[2] is fail, led_3bits_tri_o[0] blinks

decision.next_gate: Either visually inspect LEDs for this image, or build and route a v9984 JTAG-debug-enabled target so pass/fail and top-index/top-acc can be read autonomously.
